hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
file_path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path') or data.get('tool_response', {}).get('filePath', '')
repo = 'C:/Users/SBS/Desktop/test/sbs-advisor'
if not file_path.startswith(repo): sys.exit(0)
os.chdir(repo)
subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '-A'])
result = subprocess.run(['git', 'diff', '--cached', '--quiet'])
if result.returncode == 0: sys.exit(0)
fname = os.path.basename(file_path)
subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', f'auto: update {fname}'])
subprocess.run(['git', 'push', 'origin', 'master'])
"
